pages.title: Camera control dock
pages.body: A Photos-style dock to frame your scene — dial in lens length, zoom, and depth of field without hunting through menus.

pages.title: Real-time ray tracing
pages.body: Ambient occlusion and soft shadows now render live as you rotate — the polished, publication-quality look without waiting for a ray.

pages.title: Timeline movies
pages.body: Build and export multi-track movies from states, trajectories, and camera moves, right inside a docked timeline editor.
